channel.title: Comments for page "He Who Laughs Last"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "He Who Laughs Last"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
anything with clown milk immediately makes me uneasy.
bobble and SCP-2030 just put this into the '100% certified cursed' territory.
what i'm trying to say here is, thanks, i hate it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This tale has some excellent dialogue in my opinion. Like this line here?

"Hey, wanna see a magic trick?" asked Bobble.

"You already did one. You made your audience disappear."

Cracked me up. No joke. The back and forth between Bobble and Mr. Laugh is priceless. And I wish I could upvote simply on that merit alone, but I can't bring myself to upvote this as it is now.

+ show block
– hide block

Bobble sauntered up to the biker and insulted his mother. No response. He insulted his gang. No response. He insulted his mustache.

You skirt over an obvious opportunity to flaunt your dialogue muscles here. I was a bit disappointed that this was all we got.

This was getting interesting, he liked it when they struggled. Maybe he'd get his way this time

This is a bit of a personal nitpick, but I feel it equates to telling without showing. There are quite a few places like this within your tale.

"Isss for da kiddies to learn about (BUUUUURRRRP) MIME CRIME TIME!"

There is certainly a more eloquent way to use your stage actions here.

Beyond these issues, it feels like this was rushed the closer you got to wrapping things up, especially since you could spend more time painting the imagery with stuff like

Try as he might, he just kept slipping on his own vomit and making the mess worse.

that. The last act of the tale is incredibly messy and to wave it off with such a small glimpse of what's going on lessens the impact of what should essentially be a gutbuster.

All that being said, this is solid no-vote grounds for me.

EDIT: Just a small error I found here that you may want to correct.

The poor Little Mister winced in pain as her performed his trick
